name: 6e96aecf-6589-4439-b66f-8c2c526a9b4e

functionParameter.purpose: Establish Able as a home base.
functionParameter.reflective_question: What is one thing that feels scattered right now?

agentUtterance.text: Welcome to the next step: Your Life in One Place. The goal here isn't deep organization yet, just establishing a central home base. Tell me, what is one thing that feels scattered right now?

userUtterance.text: Probably my work notes, I have them across three different apps.

functionParameter.module_takeaway: User feels their work notes are scattered across multiple apps.

agentUtterance.text: That is incredibly common, and we will get those consolidated over time. I've safely logged your progress for this step. Would you like to review your to-do list now, or is there anything else on your mind today?

playbookInput.precedingConversationSummary: The user went through their daily check-in and is now going through Track 1, Phase 1, Module 2 of Able Pathways.

playbookOutput.executionSummary: Agent is helping user to consolidate work notes from three different apps into one place.

description: Teach the AI how to fetch a standard module and log its completion.
